holdings.infoBox: GARA is an equity ETF with a total of 39 individual holdings. The top holdings are Infratil stock at 3.54%, Equinix at 3.45%, Elia Group at 3.29%, Ventas at 3.04%, and Greencoat UK Wind at 3.03%.

overview.description: The Guinness Atkinson Real Assets Income ETF (GARA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund actively manages a narrow selection of REITs and global infrastructure stocks considered to be positioned to benefit from long-term investment trends. The portfolio is equally weighted GARA was launched on Dec 19, 2025 and is issued by Guinness Atkinson.
